subject: Create scripts/security_audit.py CI checks (secrets, no DELETE routes, append-only data) + evidence
description:
Create scripts/security_audit.py:
- Scan repo for common secret patterns (api keys, passwords, tokens, private keys)
- Assert no HTTP DELETE endpoints exist under apps/api/src (esp. apps/api/src/islam_intelligent/api/)
- Assert data/ usage is append-only (no deletes; no write/truncate modes to data/ paths)
- Exit 0 on pass, 1 on fail; prints [OK]/[FAIL]
- Support --simulate-secret to verify detector triggers
- Produce evidence file at .sisyphus/evidence/task-27-security-audit.txt (run output)
Verification: python scripts/security_audit.py returns [OK] Security audit passed; lsp_diagnostics clean for scripts/security_audit.py
activeForm: Implement script + run audit + write evidence
